rationale: recursive containers should exercise reference definition and reuse
integer boundary cases cover compact and long integer encoding
float and NaN/Inf partitions cover float path
complex partition covers both real and imaginary uses
bytes and memoryview partitions cover buffer writes
unicode and empty strings cover string data path
list tuple dict set frozenset partitions cover length and iteration
allow_code API tests cover positive and negative code object uses
valid and invalid byte streams cover dispatch/error uses
